auth.googleError: We couldn't sign you in with Google. Please try again.

auth.notRegisteredError: We couldn't find a student or parent account for this login. Ask your teacher for an invite link.

classes.title: Classes
classes.noClasses: No classes yet. Create your first class to get started.
classes.inviteError: Couldn't create the invite link. Please try again.

students.title: Students
students.joinViaInviteHint: Students join themselves using your class's invite link (Classes page).

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.sendError: Couldn't send the report. Please try again.
attendance.noParentEmail: No parent email on file for this student.
attendance.recordHint: Mark each student's status below. Present/late students become available to work with in the matching session.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.randomPickHint: Only students flagged present or late are eligible for random pick.
sessions.noEligibleForPick: No present/late students to pick from yet — flag attendance first.
sessions.noSessions: No sessions yet. Create one, or generate a batch of sessions at once.
sessions.weeklyDistributionHint: How many sessions to schedule on each weekday, every week in the date range (0–4).
sessions.attendanceHint: Attendance is recorded on the Attendance page. Absent/excused students are shown greyed out here and can't be given points or notes.

notes.title: Notes
notes.parentOnlyHint: Only the parent will see this note — not the student.

join.subTitle: You've been invited to "{{className}}"
join.invalidBody: This invite link has expired or doesn't exist. Ask your teacher for a new one.
join.selectChildHint: Pick your child before continuing with Google.
join.errorAuth: We couldn't complete sign-up. Please try again.

projects.title: Projects submission
projects.noProjects: No projects yet. Create one to start collecting submissions.
projects.feedbackNotePlaceholder: Anything you'd like to tell the student about their project?
projects.feedbackNoteHint: Visible to the student and their parent once you save the mark.
projects.permissionError: Couldn't {{action}} — your Firestore rules may not allow it yet. Make sure the rules covering the projects and submissions collections have been published in the Firebase console.

submit.signInTitle: Sign in to submit your project
submit.signInSub: Sign in with your student account to submit "{{className}}".
submit.wrongClassError: This submission link isn't for your class.
submit.notStudentError: We couldn't find a student account for this login. Ask your teacher for your class's invite link first.
submit.invalidBody: This submission link doesn't exist. Ask your teacher for the correct link.
submit.deadlinePassedBody: The deadline for this project has passed and it can no longer accept submissions.
submit.notePlaceholder: Anything you'd like to mention about your project?
submit.submittedBody: Your project has been submitted. You can update it until your teacher grades it.
submit.alreadyGraded: This has been graded and can no longer be edited.
